plugin_desc: LigoWave wireless AP and backhaul SNMP child template for devices under enterprise PEN 32750. The confirmed MIB set exposes wireless interface and remote-node telemetry such as signal, noise, SNR, Tx power and byte counters, but this production pass has no stable row-filter-free CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply health OID to promote into shared device health. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Wireless SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics and aggregate traffic through the generic snmp/wireless metric model while this plugin provides the LigoWave collect_type, UI and Telegraf child template.
name: Wireless
